tasks.label: MASM: Assemble Current File
args: $ml64 = & "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -find 'VC\Tools\MSVC\*\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe' | Select-Object -Last 1; if (-not $ml64) { Write-Error 'ml64.exe not found'; exit 1 }; & $ml64 /c /nologo /Fo "${workspaceFolder}\obj\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.obj" "${file}"

tasks.label: TerraForm: Build v11
args: $ml64 = & "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -find 'VC\Tools\MSVC\*\bin\Hostx64\x64\ml64.exe' | Select-Object -Last 1; $link = & "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.VisualStudio.Component.VC.Tools.x86.x64 -find 'VC\Tools\MSVC\*\bin\Hostx64\x64\link.exe' | Select-Object -Last 1; $vcLib = Split-Path $link; $vcLib = Join-Path (Split-Path (Split-Path $vcLib)) 'lib\x64'; Write-Host '[ASM] terraform_v11.asm'; & $ml64 /c /nologo /Fo obj\terraform_v11.obj terraform_v11.asm; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; Write-Host '[LINK] terraform_v11.exe'; & $link /NOLOGO /ENTRY:_start /SUBSYSTEM:CONSOLE /LIBPATH:$vcLib /LIBPATH:"C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Lib\10.0.26100.0\um\x64" /LIBPATH:"C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Lib\10.0.26100.0\ucrt\x64" /OUT:bin\terraform_v11.exe obj\terraform_v11.obj kernel32.lib; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; Write-Host '[OK] bin\terraform_v11.exe' -ForegroundColor Green
